name: StoriiCare
headline_messaging: Hero headline: "The All-in-One EHR for Care Providers." Subheading: "StoriiCare is an easy to use Electronic Health Record for Adult Day, Residential and Community-Based Care Providers." Secondary headline: "Finally, an EHR That's Actually Easy to Use!" Core value proposition centres on unified digital care management that eliminates paperwork while maintaining compliance.
pain_points_targeted: Paperwork burden ('Save up to 6 hours per week per staff member'), manual documentation inefficiency, fragmented systems ('All your care records, communication, and reporting tools in one place'), compliance complexity ('HIPAA & GDPR compliant system'), staff training challenges (emphasises ease of use), data accessibility for analytics and reporting.
cta_format: Primary CTA: "Request Demo" — prominent button repeated throughout page (hero, feature sections, footer). Secondary CTA: "Request a Quote" in navigation. No free trial visible. Demo-first approach with quote as next step.
social_proof_approach: User count: 'Over 20,000+ Happy Users and Clients.' Client logos: 8+ organisations including Age of Central Texas, ActivAge, SarahCare, NHS. Named testimonials from Patricia McCreary (Margaret's Place) and Kathryn Westland (Friendship Center). Multiple certifications displayed: SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, GDPR, Cyber Essentials Plus, NHS DSPT. Industry recognition: Featured in NAPA, Health Plus Care, Leading Age, Argentum. Video testimonials embedded from YouTube.
pricing_visibility: Limited transparency on homepage. Directs to separate /pricing page: 'StoriiCare offers flexible pricing plans tailored to the size and needs of your care organization.' Three subscription models: Activity Pro, Care Pro, and Enterprise. Actual prices require contacting sales.
tone: Professional yet approachable. Emphasises ease-of-use with conversational phrasing ('Finally, an EHR That's Actually Easy to Use!'). Authoritative on compliance and security matters. Person-centred care language woven throughout. Friendly and accessible for non-technical audiences.
ai_positioning: AI is featured as a dedicated solution set within the platform: 'AI Assistant' for AI-powered care insights, 'AI Note Translations' for automatic care note translation, and 'AI Care Planning' for personalised plan generation. Positioned as an efficiency and automation enhancement rather than the core differentiator. AI is an add-on capability, not the primary selling point.
acquisition_strategy: No acquisition activity noted. StoriiCare appears to be operating independently with offices in San Mateo (US), Edinburgh, and London. Expanding internationally across the UK and US markets.
market_segment_focus: Multi-segment: Adult Day Care, Assisted Living, Nursing Homes, Memory Care, Home Care, Housing Associations, PACE Programs, Senior Centers, Learning Disabilities services. Broad coverage across both UK and US care markets. Activity and wellbeing focus differentiates from pure care planning competitors.
trust_signal_type: SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, GDPR, ISO 27001, Cyber Essentials Plus, ONC Health IT Certification, NHS DSPT, AWS Healthcare Competency badge, PRSB Partner certification, AWS Marketplace listing, physical office locations in three countries.
content_marketing_approach: Active blog section at /blog covering topics like AI in senior care and smart care homes. Case studies available (email-gated downloads). FAQ section with 4+ detailed responses. Video testimonials embedded from YouTube. Implementation guides at /resources/implementation. No visible webinars or eBooks but substantial written content strategy.
